articles.title: Schools closed news: All CBSE, ICSE, private, govt schools to remain closed for 27-51 days in Delhi, Noida, Gurugram, UP, Rajasthan, Haryana, Telangana from… due to…, check state-wise list - news24online.com
articles.full_text:
Schools closed news: All CBSE, ICSE, private, govt schools to remain closed for 27-51 days in Delhi, Noida, Gurugram, UP, Rajasthan, Haryana, Telangana from… due to…, check state-wise list
IMD has warned of returning heatwave conditions in North-Central India, affecting several states including Delhi, UP and Rajasthan. In response, many states have announced or extended school summer vacations from mid-May to June, with dates varying by region.
The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has warned that severe heat is returning in North-Central India. After brief relief from light rain in some areas, temperatures are rising again. Several places had already recorded extreme heat above 45°C, and hot conditions are expected to return soon.
Which areas are likely to face heatwave conditions?
The IMD says heatwave conditions may affect many regions in the coming days:
- Eastern and western Rajasthan and Uttar Pradesh may continue facing extreme heat
- Western Madhya Pradesh may remain affected until 17 May
- Delhi, Haryana, and Chandigarh may see heatwave between 17-19 May
- Parts of Chhattisgarh, Telangana, Vidarbha, Madhya Maharashtra, and Marathwada may also stay very hot
When will Uttar Pradesh schools close for summer holidays?
Summer holidays in Uttar Pradesh will continue for 27 days, from 20 May to 15 June 2026. Students of classes 9, 10, and 12 may still be called for extra classes for a short period after 20 May, depending on school instructions. ALSO READ: 70 km wind, thunderstorm, heavy rains and…: Delhi, Uttar Pradesh, Bihar, Karnataka, Telangana, 5 other states to…, Check full IMD forecast here
What is the school holiday schedule in Delhi?
In Delhi, summer vacations for most classes began on 11 May 2026. Schools will reopen on 1 July 2026. However, students of classes 9, 10, and 12 may have extra classes till 23 May 2026.
What are school holiday dates in other states?
Here is a simple update from different states:
- Jharkhand, Madhya Pradesh, Chhattisgarh: Holidays expected around mid-May (varies by district)
- West Bengal: Already closed in most districts (except hill areas like Darjeeling and Kalimpong)
- Punjab: Phased holidays in May-June depending on weather
Can school holiday dates change?
